## Detected profile

- Primary: `fullstack`
- Runtime: `node`
- Language: `typescript`

## Agent adaptation guidance

- If framework is `nuxt4`: treat the project as Nuxt 4 + Vue 3 + Nitro (SSR/hybrid and route-rules aware).
- If framework is `next`: prefer App Router + server/client boundary awareness.
- If framework starts with `python-`: prioritize framework-native Python patterns.
- If framework is `nestjs`: prioritize module/provider/DTO structure.
- If capabilities include test/lint/db/api tags, prioritize those tools and conventions in implementation and review.
- If capabilities include `workflow-openspec`: project uses OpenSpec (`openspec/` and/or `openspec` CLI) — follow change/spec workflow and project slash commands when present.
- Keep assumptions explicit when confidence is `low`.
